name: SCC_CreateCurrentDemandRes_ISO
title: SCC_CreateCurrentDemandRes_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreateCurrentDemandRes_ISO ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[], long NotificationMaxDelay, char StatusCode[], char Notification[], float PresentValues[], byte LimitAchievedFlags[], char EVSEID[], long SAScheduleTupleID )
description: Creates a Current Demand Response message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.

parameters.name: ResponseCode
parameters.description: Acknowledgement status of the message.

parameters.name: NotificationMaxDelay
parameters.description: Time until the vehicle is expected to react on the notification (for DC_EVSEStatus).

parameters.name: StatusCode
parameters.description: Internal state of the EVSE (for DC_EVSEStatus).

parameters.name: Notification
parameters.description: Notification about an action that the charge point wants the vehicle to perform (for DC_EVSEStatus).

parameters.name: PresentValues
parameters.description: Replaces the two values above: PresentValues [0] = EVSEPresentVoltage PresentValues [1] = EVSEPresentCurrent

parameters.name: LimitAchievedFlags
parameters.description: Flags that indicate if any limit is achieved: LimitAchievedFlags [0] = EVSECurrentLimitAchieved LimitAchievedFlags [1] = EVSEVoltageLimitAchieved LimitAchievedFlags [2] = EVSEPowerLimitAchieved

parameters.name: EVSEID
parameters.description: Unique ID of the charge point.

parameters.name: SAScheduleTupleID
parameters.description: ID of the selected SAScheduleTuple.

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: Name Type Description
IsolationStatus char[] Current isolation condition.
MaxVoltage float EVSEMaximumVoltageLimit
MaxCurrent float EVSEMaximumCurrentLimit
MaxPower float EVSEMaximumPowerLimit
ReceiptRequired long Indicates if the vehicle is required to sent a MeteringReceiptReq.
MeterID char[] Unique ID of the meter
MeterReading long Current meter reading in Wh.
SigMeterReading byte[] Signature of the meter reading (length 64).
MeterStatus long Current status of the meter.
TMeter long Timestamp of the current SECC time.

parameters.name: Caution! Due to the requirements of the schema, the element MeterID is mandatory if any of the optional meter-related parameters are to be supplied.

return: Time until the vehicle is expected to react on the
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
